title: You Keep Repeating the Same Preview-Fix Steps

workflow_patterns.title: Planning the Whole Project Before Starting
workflow_patterns.description: You ask the agent to build something, and it spends time making a detailed plan before writing any code. It explores folders and writes out every step first.

workflow_patterns.title: Creating Many Files at Once
workflow_patterns.description: The agent creates multiple style and code files in batches, following the layout from the plan. Each file handles a specific concern like colors, layout, or animations.

workflow_patterns.title: Preview, Feedback, and Fix Rounds
workflow_patterns.description: The agent starts the site locally, takes a screenshot, you review it and point out problems (wrong images, broken buttons), then the agent fixes and re-checks.

workflow_patterns.title: Searching for Images Online
workflow_patterns.description: The agent uses a helper to search the web for image URLs, then puts those URLs into the site's code files.

workflow_patterns.title: Fixing Bugs You Reported
workflow_patterns.description: You told the agent a button wasn't working, it read the code, found the missing piece, fixed it, and confirmed it worked.

recommendations.description: Build polished frontend interfaces with dark themes, animations, and responsive CSS grid layouts.
recommendations.rationale:
Matches your site-building workflow closely.
- Covers dark themes, animations, and layouts
- Addresses the multi-file creation pattern

recommendations.description: Convert high-level objectives into step-by-step implementation plans before writing code.
recommendations.rationale:
Matches your plan-then-build approach directly.
- Turns big requests into clear step-by-step plans
addressed_patterns: Planning the Whole Project Before Starting

recommendations.description: Automated Playwright testing with screenshot comparison for web application visual verification.
recommendations.rationale:
Directly helps with your preview-and-fix rounds.
- Takes screenshots and checks for visual issues
- Catches broken buttons before you see them

recommendations.description: Create polished visual designs with gradients, animations, and curated imagery for web projects.
recommendations.rationale:
Partial match for visual polish needs.
- Helps with gradients, animations, and images
